rationale: Plan follows established generator/system split exactly. All integration points (quality.ts, compoundModes.ts, main.ts) already have precedent patterns from wireframePolyhedra and fractalGeometry. No new shaders, no new dependencies, no new interfaces. Budget control via existing maxEdgesPerShape prevents runaway recursion.

architectural_impact.notes: CubeGrowthConfig and CubeGrowthOutput are module-local types, not shared contracts. The generator exports a single function matching existing generator conventions. The system implements the existing GeometrySystem interface unchanged.

pattern_compliance.generator_system_split: COMPLIANT — pure geometry generator in generators/, Three.js system in systems/, matching fractalGeometry.ts + wireframePolyhedra.ts precedent exactly
pattern_compliance.quality_integration: COMPLIANT — uses existing maxFractalDepth and maxEdgesPerShape fields already present in QualityProfile; adds one new case to extractSystemConfig switch (established pattern)
pattern_compliance.mode_rotation: COMPLIANT — follows SingleRotationEntry registration pattern used by all 7 existing systems
pattern_compliance.shader_reuse: COMPLIANT — reuses wireframe.vert.glsl and wireframeVertex.vert/frag shaders; no new GLSL files needed
pattern_compliance.compound_modes: COMPLIANT — optional compound pairing follows existing CompoundModeDef pattern; adds entry to primaryCountForSystem

risks.detail: High tier allows depth 5 with 1920 edges (~160 cubes). Recursive function with 6-face branching has theoretical O(6^5)=7776 nodes but noise-driven probability (~0.6 decaying) and budget cap prevent blowout. Generator must check budget before each spawn.
risks.mitigation: Plan explicitly specifies budget tracking and early termination. fractalGeometry.ts already demonstrates this pattern with branchingGrowth strategy.

risks.detail: Low tier budget of 30 edges yields only 2-3 cubes (12 edges each). Visual may feel sparse.
risks.mitigation: Acceptable — low tier is meant for constrained devices. 2-3 cubes still read as a fractal seed. Matches low-tier budgets of other systems.

suggestions.detail: Plan Step 3 says 'maxFractalDepth maps from profile.maxFractalDepth (already exists: low=3, medium=4, high=6, but clamp to 5 max)'. The clamp to 5 is correct per acceptance criteria (3-5 levels) but should be documented in the extractSystemConfig case with a comment explaining the cap differs from the profile field's raw value.

Plan mentions optional depth-occlusion via invisible instanced occluder meshes (from ticket notes) but the plan steps do not implement this. This is fine — it's explicitly marked optional in the ticket — but note it as a future enhancement opportunity.

adr_reason: No new architectural patterns, shared interfaces, or dependency changes. The implementation is a straightforward extension of existing generator/system/quality/rotation infrastructure.
adr_entry: No new architectural patterns, shared interfaces, or dependency changes. The implementation is a straightforward extension of existing generator/system/quality/rotation infrastructure.
